titleStmt.title: Letter from Edward O'Farrell to A.A. Hargrave, 28 June 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Edward O'Farrell

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Letter from Edward O'Farrell (1857-1926) to A.A. Hargrave announcing Hargrave's promotion to temporary medicial officer at Tralee prison.
Edward O'Farrell served as the assistant undersecretary of Ireland after the Easter Rising.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary’s Office Registered papers, CSO-RP-1916-5615-9787

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Copy 9787. 28th June, 1916. Sir, I am directed by the Lords Justices to inform you that
Their Excellencies have been pleased to appoint you to be
temporary Medical Officer of the Tralee Prison for a
period not exceeding three years from the 2nd proximo,
inclusive, at a salary at the rate of £60 per annum. I am to add that when called on to examine retired
Prison Officers in receipt of allowances as compensation
for injury, you will be entitled to a fee of 10/- for
each examination. I am,
Sir,
Your obedient Servant, E O'Farrell A.A. Hargrave, Esq., L.R.C.P.&S.I.,
Tralee,
CO. KERRY.
